findings.title: Production dependency vulnerabilities: next@14.2.35 (SSRF, DoS, Middleware bypass) + fast-uri path-traversal
findings.resolution: next upgraded to 15.5.19; fast-uri bumped to 3.1.2 via pnpm override >=3.1.1; all original advisories cleared from audit output

findings.title: No AwsSecretsManager implementation; JWT_SIGNING_SECRET and SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET loaded from plain env vars violating I-S09
findings.resolution: JWT_SIGNING_SECRET and COOKIE_SECRET now fetched via AwsSecretsProvider at startup; fail-closed; no randomUUID default. Connector client secret (HIGH-SECRETS-01-RESIDUAL) now resolved in r3 — see below.

findings.title: connector-side ISecretsManager not production-wired: LocalSecretsManager used unconditionally including in production
findings.resolution: AwsSecretsManager (implements ISecretsManager) implemented using @aws-sdk/client-secrets-manager + IRSA (no static credentials). main.ts wires it conditionally: isProduction ? new AwsSecretsManager(region, shopifyClientSecretRef) : new LocalSecretsManager(). getEnvOrThrow('SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET') holds ARN in prod, raw value in dev. Fail-closed: AwsSecretsManager throws on SDK error or empty response. Secret value never logged. I-S09 satisfied.

findings.title: Connector/pixel routes built but not mounted; validateSession+rbacGuard deferred to mount time with no enforcement
findings.resolution: Connector routes mounted in Fastify scopes with scope.addHook('preHandler', sessionPreHandler) + requireRole('analyst'|'manager'). Pixel routes identical pattern. Public callback correctly unguarded. getBrandId() throws 400 fail-closed.

findings.title: fastify@4.29.1 GHSA-jx2c-rxcm-jvmq (CVE-2026-25223) Content-Type body validation bypass in apps/core (production path)
findings.resolution: fastify upgraded to 5.8.5 (>=5.7.2 patched) in apps/core. GHSA-jx2c-rxcm-jvmq cleared from apps/core audit path. @fastify/cookie upgraded to 11.0.2; cookie/CSRF handling correct post-migration (httpOnly, secure, sameSite verified). Residual apps/collector > fastify@4.29.1 path: collector is a TODO stub (no running server, no schema routes) — zero exploitability, not a deployed M1 service.

findings.title: Custom JWT verifyJwt does not validate alg header claim; uses received header in signingInput
findings.resolution: verifyJwt now decodes header, asserts alg===HS256 and typ===JWT before signature check; uses canonical JWT_HEADER constant for signing input. Timing-safe comparison preserved.

findings.title: OAuth callback reads brand_id from attacker-controlled query param
findings.resolution: consumeAndGetBrandId(state) returns brandId from server-stored record; HandleOAuthCallbackCommand derives brandId exclusively from stateRecord.brandId; OAuthCallbackInput interface omits brandId; test at HandleOAuthCallbackCommand.test.ts:223 proves ATTACKER_BRAND_ID cannot override REAL_BRAND_ID

findings.title: Dashboard BFF endpoints not implemented
findings.resolution: All 4 dashboard endpoints present: /v1/dashboard/brand-summary, /v1/dashboard/connection-status, /v1/dashboard/data-status, /v1/dashboard/onboarding-progress. All Postgres-only, parameterized queries, protected by bffProtectedPreHandler.

findings.title: Isolation-fuzz connector tests: mirror-policy approach for isofuzz_connector_app role
findings.ruling: ACCEPTABLE — the mirror-policy uses the identical two-arg GUC predicate as the production policy. Negative controls (brand-A≠brand-B cross-tenant isolation, no-GUC→0 rows) are genuine and non-tautological. NOSUPERUSER NOBYPASSRLS structural constraint enforced at role creation. NN-1 migration-time assertion covers the production policy gap. Not a finding.

findings.title: DevEmailAdapter logs raw token in body_preview (dev mode only)
findings.fix: Mask token in body_preview log — dev-only, deferred to M2

findings.title: forgotPassword has no dummy argon2 hash for missing users - measurable timing channel
findings.fix: Acceptable for M1 with content-identical response; add dummy hash in M2 if timing attack becomes a concern

findings.title: No rate limiting on auth endpoints (login, register, forgot-password)
findings.fix: Add @fastify/rate-limit before public launch; add to M2 backlog

scanner_output.secrets_grep: PASS - 0 hardcoded credentials in production source; process.env['SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET'] only in LocalSecretsManager.ts dev stub
scanner_output.current_setting_one_arg: PASS - 0 violations in migrations 0001-0007; all use two-arg TRUE form
scanner_output.bypassrls: PASS - only in 0001_init.sql assertion (checking it is NOT granted) and test files
scanner_output.forbidden_columns: PASS - 0 *_token/*_ciphertext/*_secret/*_key columns in connector DDL; install_token in 0007 is a public UUID pixel tag (not a credential)
scanner_output.pnpm_audit_apps_core: PASS - fastify 5.8.5 (>=5.7.2); GHSA-jx2c-rxcm-jvmq cleared from apps/core path
scanner_output.pnpm_audit_residual: apps/collector > fastify@4.29.1 (GHSA-jx2c-rxcm-jvmq HIGH) — collector is a TODO stub, no deployed server, zero exploitability; vitest CRITICAL, handlebars CRITICAL/HIGH (dev toolchain), esbuild HIGH (vitest transitive), vite HIGH (vitest transitive) — all dev-only paths, not in production images
scanner_output.turbo_typecheck_test_lint: 75/75 PASS (55 unit tests: ShopifyHmac 9, OAuthStateNonce 10, SecretRef 7, HandleOAuthCallbackCommand 5, auth.service 24)
scanner_output.fastify_cookie_v11_regression: PASS - brain_session: httpOnly=true, secure=isProduction, sameSite=strict, maxAge set; brain_csrf: httpOnly=false (double-submit), secure=isProduction, sameSite=strict; logout clearCookie both cookies; no regression

summary: r3 PASS: both open HIGHs resolved. HIGH-SECRETS-01-RESIDUAL: AwsSecretsManager implements ISecretsManager, wired conditionally in main.ts on isProduction, IRSA credentials, fail-closed, SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET holds ARN in prod — I-S09 satisfied. HIGH-SCA-02: fastify upgraded to 5.8.5 (>=5.7.2 patched) in apps/core; GHSA-jx2c-rxcm-jvmq cleared; @fastify/cookie v11 cookie attributes correct; collector stub has zero exploitability. ISO-SEED-01 mirror-policy: acceptable — identical predicate, genuine negative controls, NOBYPASSRLS structural guarantee, NN-1 migration assertion covers prod-policy gap. NN-1..NN-7 + L-02 all PASS; 75/75 turbo. No regression.
